planes.description: Silver twin-boom fighter-style top-down aircraft. Recommended as the initial player plane placeholder/reference.
planes.notes: Wide wingspan, distinctive silhouette, best for player readability.

recommended_godot_usage.import_as: Texture2D sprite/billboard placeholder or reference for MeshInstance3D model creation
recommended_godot_usage.orientation: nose/up-screen; movement plane X/Z; camera orthographic top-down
recommended_godot_usage.collision: use simplified Area3D hitbox, not exact image silhouette

planes.description: Dark green single-engine fighter on black background. Good for enemy light fighter / ace variant.
planes.notes: High contrast dark enemy plane; background removed in processed PNG.

planes.description: Green twin-engine bomber viewed from above. Recommended for bomber waves and mini-boss escorts.
planes.notes: Long fuselage; use larger hitbox than fighter but still arcade-fair.

planes.description: Camouflaged single-engine fighter viewed from above. Good for elite enemy or island-defense squadron.
planes.notes: Busy camouflage; use outline/glow in-game if readability drops over ocean/islands.

planes.description: Light-coloured single-engine fighter viewed from above. Useful as alternate fighter, early-stage enemy, or power-up escort.
planes.notes: Good silhouette; may need darker outline over bright clouds.

planes.description: Large six-engine bomber viewed from above. Recommended as Stage 1/2 boss placeholder or late-game heavy boss reference.
planes.notes: Very large wingspan; use boss health bar and multi-part damage points.
